verse_text: Jesus said to him, 'If you want to be perfect, go, sell what you have and give to the poor, and you will have treasure in heaven; and come, follow Me.'

links.context: Jesus urges us to "give to the poor" ([[MAT.19:21]]) and to lay down our lives for others ([[JOH.15:13]]). But even such a selfless act done without love profits us nothing.
